About Us

Established in 2020

At Stardom Recordz, we believe that every artist has a star waiting to shine. Founded in 2020 with a bold vision to redefine the music industry, our label is dedicated to discovering, developing, and promoting exceptional talent. We’re not just a record label; we’re a launchpad for musical greatness.

Our Story

Stardom Recordz was born from a deep love for music and a desire to create an environment where artistry and innovation thrive. What started as a passionate endeavor in Canada has blossomed into a vibrant label with a diverse roster of groundbreaking artists across genres. Our journey has been fueled by a commitment to excellence and a belief that every artist has a unique story worth sharing.

Contact Us
